PCY-DB-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-exacc-db-admin
PCY-DB-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy which allows the grp-exacc-db-admins group users to manage databases in all the environments and projects of the OE01.
statements: allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to use cloud-shell in tenancy
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to read all-resources in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to use ons-family in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage alarms in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage metrics in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage orm-stacks in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage orm-jobs in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage orm-config-source-providers in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to read audit-events in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to read work-requests in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage data-safe-family in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage cloudevents-rules in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to use exadata-infrastructures in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to use vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to use dbServers in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage db-nodes in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage autonomous-vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage backup-destinations in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage backups in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage database-software-image in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage db-homes in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage databases in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage pluggable-databases in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage autonomous-databases in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage autonomous-backups in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage autonomous-vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-db-admins to manage autonomous-container-databases in compartment cmp-exacc

allow group grp-exacc-infra-admins to manage dbnode-console-connection in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-infra-admins to manage dbnode-console-history in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-infra-admins to manage alarms in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-infra-admins to manage metrics in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-exacc-infra-admins to manage orm-stacks in compartment cmp-exacc
